title: Updated Nether Fortress
description: Visually updates nether fortresses in a vanilla friendly manner
body:
![An updated nether fortress with the text: Updated Nether Fortress By Braytonk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0038d82598f0584f6f7e06e646113d085593d857_0.webp)
## Braytonk's Updated Nether Fortress
This datapack revamps the vanilla Nether Fortress structure in the following ways:

- Visually updated bridges and rooms for nicer looking structures
- Better interesting passageway and room generation for more interesting exploration
- A guaranteed nether wart room in all fortressess

Otherwise, the chest loot, mob spawns, and structure location remain the same, as to make the datapack as vanilla-friendly as possible.
